text: I love you, but I will never tell you.
You are my favorite secret.
I look at you when you look away.
My heart beats fast when you are near.
You are the best thing I cannot have.
I hide my feelings behind a smile.
Just seeing you makes my day better.
I talk to you in my head all the time.
You have my heart, but you don't know it.
I am happy just being in the same room as you.
It hurts to see you love someone else.
I cry for you, but you never see my tears.
Loving you is beautiful, but it hurts so much.
I wish I was enough for you.
You are breaking my heart, and you don't even know it.
I am jealous of the people who get to hold you.
The hardest part is acting like I don't care.
I feel so empty when you leave.
You are my pain and my cure.
My heart aches when I hear your name.
My silence is full of words for you.
I want to say I love you, but my voice stops.
You read my texts, but you don't read my heart.
I stay quiet so I don't lose you.
The unsaid words are the heaviest.
I speak to you in my silence.
I wish my eyes could tell you how I feel.
Sometimes, silence is the only way to love you.
I swallow my words every time you look at me.
I am loud in my head, but quiet around you.
I am still waiting for you to notice me.
I wait for your message all day.
My life feels like a waiting room for you.
I will wait for you, even if you never come.
Waiting for you hurts, but I won't stop.
Every time my phone rings, I hope it is you.
I wait for the day you will look at me differently.
I am always here, waiting for my turn.
Patience is hard when I want you so much.
I waste my time waiting for a maybe.
You sit next to me, but you feel so far away.
We are close, but not close enough.
The distance between our hearts is too big.
I try to reach you, but you keep walking.
You are right here, but I cannot touch you.
I hate the space between us.
You are in my heart, but not in my life.
I feel lonely even when you are with me.
We are in the same place, but different worlds.
I wish I could bridge the gap between us.
I remember everything you say to me.
Your simple 'hello' is my favorite memory.
I live in the memories we never made.
I replay our small talks in my head.
Your smile is a picture I keep in my mind.
I hold onto the smallest things you do.
I remember the day I fell for you.
Even an empty room reminds me of you.
My memory of you is better than my reality.
I can't forget someone who gave me so much to remember.
I wake up late just to dream of you a little longer.
You are mine only in my dreams.
I hate waking up because you are not here.
In my dreams, you always hold my hand.
My nights are better because you visit my sleep.
I wish my dreams of you were real.
I close my eyes just to see your face.
You are the star of every dream I have.
I sleep to escape a world where you don't love me.
In my imagination, we are so happy together.
Being your friend is both a blessing and a curse.
I listen to you talk about him, and I smile for you.
I am your friend, but I want to be more.
I help you fly, even if you fly away from me.
I will be whatever you need me to be.
You ask for my advice, but I just want to hold you.
I play the role of a friend perfectly.
I put your happiness before my own.
I will always support you, even from the shadows.
Losing you as a friend would hurt more than not having you.
I know I have to let you go, but I can't.
I am trying to forget you, but it is too hard.
Moving on means leaving my heart behind.
I will step back so you can be happy.
I accept that you will never be mine.
Letting you go is the hardest kind of love.
I will stop hoping, but I won't stop loving.
I walk away, hoping you will ask me to stay.
My love for you will slowly fade into the background.
I am slowly learning to live without you.
Loving you made me a better person.
I don't regret giving you my heart.
Even if you don't love me, I am glad I met you.
My love for you asks for nothing in return.
To love you from afar is enough for me.
You taught me how to love purely.
My heart is happy just knowing you exist.
I will always wish the best for you.
Some loves are beautiful because they are incomplete.
You will always be my favorite unfinished story.
